rows.name: Gasoline (all types)
rows.liveDriver: EIA weekly regular gasoline calendar-month average $3.816/gal vs prior $4.050/gal using 2 weekly prints
rows.scaffoldDriver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

rows.name: Used cars and trucks
rows.liveDriver: SETA02 SA model: rho 0.47 * prior CPI SA -0.23 pp + Manheim m2 signal +0.00 pp * volatility scale 0.71 + level gap z=-1.07, mean-reversion adj +0.02 pp; timing m0 2026-07 unavailable in Manheim feed; m2 2026-05 +0.32% pub 2026-06-08; omitted unavailable m0. Compared against CUSR0000SETA02; no asymmetry term kept. SA forecast converted to NSA using the component's historical SA/NSA offset.
rows.scaffoldDriver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

rows.name: Airline fares
rows.liveDriver: airfare fallback -0.78% plus guarded jet-fuel pass-through -1.08% from EIA Gulf Coast jet fuel calendar-month average $2.767/gal vs prior $3.042/gal using 3 daily prints
rows.scaffoldDriver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

rows.name: Other motor fuels
rows.liveDriver: EIA weekly U.S. No. 2 diesel retail calendar-month average $4.687/gal vs prior $5.024/gal using 2 weekly prints; fitted retail pass-through beta 0.903 on 129 prior months; NSA forecast -6.06%
rows.scaffoldDriver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

rows.name: Fuel oil
rows.liveDriver: EIA New York Harbor No. 2 heating oil spot calendar-month average $3.138/gal vs prior $3.302/gal using 3 daily prints; fitted retail pass-through beta 0.504 on 129 prior months; NSA forecast -2.49%
rows.scaffoldDriver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

rows.name: Milk
rows.liveDriver: DAIRY commodity-complex factor: cuts USDA advanced Base Class I milk price; lag 0, loading 1.38; live cut adjustment 0.00 pp
rows.scaffoldDriver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

rows.name: Uncooked ground beef
rows.liveDriver: BEEF commodity-complex factor: cuts USDA boxed beef Choice primal Chuck, USDA boxed beef Choice primal Round, USDA boxed beef Choice/Select spread; lag 0, loading 0.95; live cut adjustment 0.00 pp
rows.scaffoldDriver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

rows.name: Butter and margarine
rows.liveDriver: DAIRY commodity-complex factor: cuts USDA NDPSR Butter; lag 0, loading 1.50; live cut adjustment 0.00 pp
rows.scaffoldDriver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

rows.name: Eggs
rows.liveDriver: EGGS commodity-complex factor: cuts USDA combined regional caged white Large eggs midpoint, USDA combined regional caged white Extra Large eggs midpoint, USDA combined regional caged white Medium eggs midpoint; lag 0, loading 1.00; live cut adjustment 0.21 pp
rows.scaffoldDriver: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average
